examples.text: Who is more at fault, Bass asks, the professional archaeologist who carefully excavates a site and never publishes on it or the treasure hunter who locates a submerged wreck, salvages part, conserves part, and publishes a book on the operation?
examples.explanation: 巴斯问道，谁更有过错？是那位仔细发掘遗址却从不发表成果的专业考古学家，还是那位发现沉船残骸、打捞部分、保存部分并出版相关书籍的寻宝者？
